pr.title: fix(deps): bump Pillow from 10.2.0 to 10.3.0 (closes #49)
pr.body:
### SUMMARY

Bumps [Pillow](https://pypi.org/project/Pillow/) from 10.2.0 to 10.3.0 to remediate **CVE-2024-28219** (GHSA-3f63-hfp8-52jq, severity: HIGH).

**Vulnerability:** Buffer overflow in Pillow's `_imagingcms` C extension (versions < 10.3.0). Processing a maliciously crafted image file can trigger heap corruption, potentially enabling arbitrary code execution. Superset uses Pillow for chart thumbnail image generation — user-controlled image data reaching the thumbnail pipeline is a directly exploitable path.

**Files changed:**
- `requirements/base.txt` — `pillow==10.2.0` → `pillow==10.3.0`
- `requirements/development.txt` — `pillow==10.2.0` → `pillow==10.3.0`
- `pyproject.toml` — `Pillow>=10.2.0, <13` → `Pillow>=10.3.0, <13`

**Test output:** (will be appended after test runs complete)

### BEFORE/AFTER SCREENSHOTS OR ANIMATED GIF
Not applicable — dependency-only change.

### TESTING INSTRUCTIONS
1. `pip install -e ".[development]"` — verify install succeeds
2. `pytest tests/unit_tests/ -x -q` — verify unit tests pass
3. `pytest tests/integration_tests/ -x -q` — verify integration tests pass

### ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
- [x] Has associated issue: Fixes #49
- [ ] Required feature flags:
- [ ] Changes UI
- [ ] Includes DB Migration
- [ ] Introduces new feature or API
- [ ] Removes existing feature or API
